pageContext.name: Power
pageContext.description: From the anime series Chainsaw Man comes a 1:7 scale figure of Denji's reliable buddy, Power!  Produced by FNEX and sculpted by Design COCO at 8.7' tall, the greedy and manipulative Blood Fiend is captured in a fearless pose surrounded by weapons made from her own blood using her Blood Manipulation technique as she gives a confident, somewhat mischievous smile.  Her outfit has been carefully sculpted down to the disheveled look of her hoodie and untucked shirt and the details of her high-top sneakers. Even the sculpting of her hair is on point as it drapes down her back and her long bangs fall in front of her face.   Don't miss your chance to add this Power Collectible Figure to your anime collection today!
